# Ytmp3 LLM crawling policy
# Non-standard file (llms.txt / ai.txt). For transparency only.

User-agent: GPTBot
Allow: /
Disallow: /api
Disallow: /api/
Disallow: /api/*

User-agent: Claude-Web
Allow: /
Disallow: /api
Disallow: /api/
Disallow: /api/*

User-agent: PerplexityBot
Allow: /
Disallow: /api
Disallow: /api/
Disallow: /api/*

User-agent: Google-Extended
Allow: /
Disallow: /api
Disallow: /api/
Disallow: /api/*
